title: Unforgettable Romantic Escapes in Paris Outside The Eiffel Tower
excerpt: Explore the romantic side of Paris that's beyond the Eiffel Tower. Discover secret spots and lesser-known destinations that are just perfect for a dreamy escapade.
outline: Picnic at Parc de Buttes Chaumont

title: Shop 'Til You Drop: Paris for the Fashion-Conscious Couple
